name: thiamine mononitrate
description: A stable salt form of vitamin B1 used to fortify foods and prevent thiamine deficiency.
raw_text: Fine classic plain donuts: Soybean oil, dextrose, soy flour, leavening (sodium acid pyrophosphate, baking soda, monocalcium phosphate, calcium sulphate), non-fat milk powder, dried egg yolks, salt, corn flour, vegetable emulsifier (mono and diglycerides with bht and citric acid to help protect flavor), partially hydrogenated vegetable shortening (soybean and/or cottonseed oil), sodium propionate (to retard spoilage), soybea | Butter streusel coffee cake: Water, natural flavor, ethyl alcohol, propylene glycol, molasses and caramel color, sulfites], non-fat milk and whey solids, honey, guar gum, xanthan gum, artificial flavor [water, ethyl alcohol, artificial flavor] ascorbic acid. | Classic Corn Dogs: Mechanically separated chicken, water, dextrose, salt contains 2% or less of corn syrup, spices, sodium phosphate, flavorings, paprika and paprika oleoresin, sodium erythorbate, sodium nitrite
